query:
SELECT
            u.did,
            u.handle,
            d.granted_scopes,
            d.granted_at
        FROM account_delegations d
        JOIN users u ON u.did = d.delegated_did
        WHERE d.controller_did = $1
          AND d.revoked_at IS NULL
          AND u.deactivated_at IS NULL
          AND u.takedown_ref IS NULL
        ORDER BY d.granted_at DESC
